html:
Exclusive to:

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.99 days.

The Lucky Cat Jar can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_24".

×8

Lucky Cat Jar
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_24"
Exclusive to:
“I think Wickerbottom had a cat.”
–Wilson
“I don't want Ms. Wickerbottom to be sad. Let's burn it!”
–Willow
“Kitty has nice round tum.”
–Wolfgang
“I've never been lucky.”
–Wendy
“WHAT'S A CAT?”
–WX-78
“What a positively adorable kitty cat. Sigh.”
–Wickerbottom
“We should whip up some pumpkin cookies to put in there, eh?”
–Woodie
“It's been beheaded.”
–Maxwell
“Grant me luck ön the battlefield!”
–Wigfrid
“No cookies.”
–Webber
“I think Mme. Wickerbottom had a cat.”
–Warly
“Me-Raow? Oh. Not alive”
–Wormwood
“The reliable quality of a mass manufactured product!”
–Winona
“Perhaps a cat genie awaits inside?”
–Wortox
“Look happy.”
–Wurt
“Woby doesn't seem to like it very much.”
–Walter
“I'm not much of a cat person.”
–Wanda
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.99 days.
The Lucky Cat Jar can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_24".
